domain_results.evidence: Build, typecheck, full Vitest, golden path, and deterministic ingestion passed; lint/test aliases missing; pnpm run check timed out in rollback governance; certification harness non-certifying.
Same-user and non-owner smokes passed; packet PDF non-owner denial 403; endpoint inspection confirms owner/admin checks.

domain_results.domain: Credit report upload, ingestion, parsing, and worker processing
domain_results.evidence: Staging and simulated proofs pass; accepted production ingest runtime evidence is not submitted.

domain_results.domain: Deterministic parsing and canonical truth preservation
domain_results.evidence: Deterministic ingestion report and parser regression pass; display layers do not mutate truth.
Golden path, violation corrections, and evidence ledger tests pass; packet metadata preserves internal references.

domain_results.domain: Packet readiness, lifecycle, and PDF generation
domain_results.evidence: Packet smoke, packet targeted suites, and PDF cache miss proof pass; ownership and readiness enforced.
Consumer-facing forbidden terms absent in tests; readable account/date/action text present; internal metadata preserved.
Normal packet user wording is safe; response ops dashboard skip count and deferred live controls remain.

domain_results.domain: Deployment, CI/CD, staging, production, and rollback readiness
domain_results.evidence: Rollback/workflow controls are strong; production promotion pack remains non-certifying.
Alerting is dry-run-only; no formal exclusion submitted; staging observability SSH failed.
Staging-safe measured baseline passes; runtime size warnings remain; production-scale proof is not complete.
Code-level auditability passes; production proof blockers remain.

findings.title: Production promotion pack is non-certifying
findings.evidence: production-scale:promotion-pack returned CERTIFYING:false, limited beta, canPromoteProductionAtScale:false, and six unresolved production blockers.
findings.user_impact: Users could enter production before required recovery, worker, storage, alerting, migration, and retention proof is accepted.
findings.recommended_remediation: Close all unresolved production blockers and rerun promotion pack until certifying true.
findings.suggested_test_coverage: CI/promotion gate requiring latest-production-promotion-pack.json CERTIFYING true.

findings.title: Disaster recovery proof is simulated-only
findings.evidence: restore:evidence:current-check status simulated-only and currentOperationalProof false; promotion pack blocker 1 Critical/requires-human-proof.
findings.production_impact: Recovery RPO/RTO for sensitive production data is not proven.
findings.user_impact: Recovery from outage or data loss is unproven.
findings.security_privacy_impact: Sensitive data continuity and recovery proof missing.
findings.recommended_remediation: Submit accepted human-observed restore drill evidence with sanitized RPO/RTO and post-restore checks.
findings.suggested_test_coverage: Promotion acceptance validator requiring accepted human restore evidence.

findings.title: Production ingest runtime proof is not accepted
findings.evidence: production-worker:readiness-evidence status prepared-awaiting-human-production-evidence and productionProof false; blocker 2 Critical/partial.
findings.production_impact: Production worker-backed queue processing is not accepted as proven.
findings.user_impact: Uploads may remain queued/delayed at scale without accepted worker proof.
findings.recommended_remediation: Run documented bounded production worker evidence path and submit sanitized queue-depth/worker result evidence.
findings.suggested_test_coverage: Promotion pack fails until accepted production worker evidence exists.

findings.title: Historical raw report byte remediation remains unresolved
findings.evidence: storage remediation status inventory-unreliable; blocker 6 High/partial; acceptance not closed.
findings.production_impact: Sensitive raw report storage/remediation state is not reliable enough for promotion.
findings.user_impact: Credit-report data retention posture remains uncertain.
findings.security_privacy_impact: Sensitive report data remediation proof incomplete.
findings.recommended_remediation: Run reliable sanitized inventory with DB access and submit remediation acceptance.
findings.suggested_test_coverage: Acceptance validator rejects unreliable inventory and requires sanitized output proof.

findings.title: Observability and alerting proof is not accepted
findings.evidence: alerting exclusion status not-submitted; response ops live scheduler disabled and alerting dry-run-only; blocker 9 High/simulated-proof-only.
findings.production_impact: Critical production failures may not be live-alerted or formally excluded.
findings.security_privacy_impact: Delayed detection of sensitive workflow failures.
findings.recommended_remediation: Complete live alert delivery proof or submit accepted formal alerting exclusion.
findings.suggested_test_coverage: Promotion pack requires accepted alerting/exclusion evidence.

findings.title: Migration governance still depends on a temporary allowlist
findings.evidence: migrations:gate status accepted-temporary-allowlist and CERTIFYING:false; promotion pack blocker 10 High/partial.
findings.production_impact: Runtime ensure residuals remain temporarily accepted rather than fully governed.
findings.security_privacy_impact: Schema drift can affect auditability and access control assumptions.
findings.recommended_remediation: Convert temporary allowlist residuals to reviewed additive ledger migrations before allowlist expiry.
findings.suggested_test_coverage: Migration gate expiry enforcement in CI/promotion.

findings.title: Production certification harness is not self-contained
findings.evidence: production-scale:certify failed auth smoke gates because required env was not supplied by the harness; exact smokes pass directly.
findings.recommended_remediation: Inject staging-safe smoke env or document wrapper command requirements.

findings.title: Default pnpm run check times out rollback governance tests locally
findings.evidence: pnpm run check timed out three tests; same file passed with --testTimeout=60000.
findings.recommended_remediation: Increase timeout for the suite or optimize workflow parsing.

findings.title: Lint and plain test commands are unavailable
findings.evidence: pnpm run lint and pnpm test are missing.
findings.recommended_remediation: Add aliases or document canonical commands.

findings.title: Staging observability SSH check cannot run from this environment
findings.evidence: check:staging-observability failed with SSH permission denied.
findings.recommended_remediation: Fix authorized read-only SSH path or document an equivalent observability proof.

findings.title: Local Docker daemon unavailable for staging service diagnostics
findings.evidence: check:staging-services reported Docker daemon unavailable; staging endpoint reachable.
findings.recommended_remediation: Run from an environment with Docker access or attach remote service diagnostics.

findings.title: Runtime size warnings remain accepted by waiver
findings.evidence: main JS/CSS and PDF dependencies exceed warning thresholds; policy warning-only waiver accepted.
findings.recommended_remediation: Track bundle splitting and dependency trimming.

findings.title: Response operations are operator-ready with deferred live controls
findings.evidence: live scheduler disabled, alerting dry-run-only, dashboard skip count 55.
findings.recommended_remediation: Complete live scheduler/alert proof or accepted exclusion.

findings.title: Production-safe probes are plan-only
findings.evidence: production-safe probe evidence does not execute production runtime probes by this command.
findings.recommended_remediation: Run approved read-only production probes if policy permits.

findings.title: Sensitive list endpoint proof is partial/design-only
Generated evidence files trigger CRLF warnings
findings.evidence: git diff --check reported line-ending warnings only.
findings.recommended_remediation: Normalize evidence artifact line endings if desired.

findings.title: Admin packet page intentionally mentions render/cache internals
findings.evidence: render/cache wording is under isAdmin; normal user branch is plain-language.
findings.recommended_remediation: Keep admin diagnostics gated and test the normal-user branch.

findings.title: Safety-flag refusal messages add command friction
findings.evidence: baseline commands refuse without explicit --simulated/--local/--dry-run/--staging-safe flags.

remaining_risks: Six unresolved production blockers in the promotion pack.
No accepted production ingest runtime/queue-depth evidence.
Raw report storage remediation inventory is unreliable/not accepted closed.
Alerting remains dry-run-only or no formal exclusion submitted.
Migration governance still relies on a temporary allowlist.
Default production certification/check commands are not cleanly certifying from this environment.
Runtime bundle size warnings remain under waiver.
next_recommended_prompts: Close production blocker 1 with accepted human-observed restore drill evidence.
Run and accept bounded production ingest worker queue-depth evidence.
Complete sanitized raw report inventory/remediation acceptance.
Submit live alerting proof or formal alerting exclusion evidence.
Convert migration temporary allowlist residuals into reviewed ledger migrations.
Patch production-scale certification so authenticated staging smokes and rollback governance tests are self-contained.
Rerun production-scale:certify and production-scale:promotion-pack until CERTIFYING:true.
